title: galium mollugo var. aristatum
intro: Galium mollugo var. aristatum is a lesser-known variety of the cleavers plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Galium mollugo var. aristatum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in the form of poultices or compresses to treat various health conditions.
